column.name: MANDT
column.description: Client

column.name: MATNR
column.description: Material Number

column.name: BWKEY
column.description: Valuation Area

column.name: BWTAR
column.description: Valuation Type

column.name: LVORM
column.description: Deletion flag for all material data of a valuation type

column.name: LBKUM
column.description: Total Valuated Stock

column.name: SALK3
column.description: Value of Total Valuated Stock

column.name: VPRSV
column.description: Price control indicator

column.name: VERPR
column.description: Moving Average Price/Periodic Unit Price

column.name: STPRS
column.description: Standard price

column.name: PEINH
column.description: Price unit

column.name: BKLAS
column.description: Valuation Class

column.name: SALKV
column.description: Value based on moving average price (only with price ctrl S)

column.name: VMKUM
column.description: Total valuated stock in previous period

column.name: VMSAL
column.description: Value of total valuated stock in previous period

column.name: VMVPR
column.description: Price Control Indicator in Previous Period

column.name: VMVER
column.description: Moving Average Price/Periodic Unit Price in Previous Period

column.name: VMSTP
column.description: Standard price in the previous period

column.name: VMPEI
column.description: Price unit of previous period

column.name: VMBKL
column.description: Valuation Class in Previous Period

column.name: VMSAV
column.description: Value based on moving average price (previous period)

column.name: VJKUM
column.description: Total Valuated Stock in Previous Year

column.name: VJSAL
column.description: Value of total valuated stock in previous year

column.name: VJVPR
column.description: Price Control Indicator in Previous Year

column.name: VJVER
column.description: Moving Average Price/Periodic Unit Price in Previous Year

column.name: VJSTP
column.description: Standard price in previous year

column.name: VJPEI
column.description: Price unit of previous year

column.name: VJBKL
column.description: Valuation Class in Previous Year

column.name: VJSAV
column.description: Value based on moving average price (previous year)

column.name: LFGJA
column.description: Fiscal Year of Current Period

column.name: LFMON
column.description: Current period (posting period)

column.name: BWTTY
column.description: Valuation Category

column.name: STPRV
column.description: Previous price

column.name: LAEPR
column.description: Date of the last price change

column.name: ZKPRS
column.description: Future price

column.name: ZKDAT
column.description: Date as of which the price is valid

column.name: TIMESTAMP
column.description: UTC Time Stamp in Short Form (YYYYMMDDhhmmss)

column.name: BWPRS
column.description: Valuation price based on tax law: level 1

column.name: BWPRH
column.description: Valuation price based on commercial law: level 1

column.name: VJBWS
column.description: Valuation price based on tax law: level 3

column.name: VJBWH
column.description: Valuation price based on commercial law: level 3

column.name: VVJSL
column.description: Value of total valuated stock in year before last

column.name: VVJLB
column.description: Total valuated stock in year before last

column.name: VVMLB
column.description: Total valuated stock in period before last

column.name: VVSAL
column.description: Value of total valuated stock in period before last

column.name: ZPLPR
column.description: Future planned price

column.name: ZPLP1
column.description: Future Planned Price 1

column.name: ZPLP2
column.description: Future Planned Price 2

column.name: ZPLP3
column.description: Future Planned Price 3

column.name: ZPLD1
column.description: Date from Which Future Planned Price 1 Is Valid

column.name: ZPLD2
column.description: Date from Which Future Planned Price 2 Is Valid

column.name: ZPLD3
column.description: Date from Which Future Planned Price 3 Is Valid

column.name: PPERZ
column.description: Period for future standard cost estimate (deactivated)

column.name: PPERL
column.description: Period for current standard cost estimate (deactivated)

column.name: PPERV
column.description: Period for previous standard cost estimate (deactivated)

column.name: KALKZ
column.description: Indicator: standard cost estimate for future period

column.name: KALKL
column.description: Standard Cost Estimate for Current Period

column.name: KALKV
column.description: Indicator: standard cost estimate for previous period

column.name: KALSC
column.description: Overhead key (deactivated)

column.name: XLIFO
column.description: LIFO/FIFO-Relevant

column.name: MYPOL
column.description: Pool number for LIFO valuation

column.name: BWPH1
column.description: Valuation price based on commercial law: level 2

column.name: BWPS1
column.description: Valuation price based on tax law: level 2

column.name: ABWKZ
column.description: Lowest value: devaluation indicator

column.name: PSTAT
column.description: Maintenance status

column.name: KALN1
column.description: Cost Estimate Number - Product Costing

column.name: KALNR
column.description: Cost Estimate Number for Cost Est. w/o Qty Structure

column.name: BWVA1
column.description: Valuation Variant for Future Standard Cost Estimate

column.name: BWVA2
column.description: Valuation Variant for Current Standard Cost Estimate

column.name: BWVA3
column.description: Valuation Variant for Previous Standard Cost Estimate

column.name: VERS1
column.description: Costing Version of Future Standard Cost Estimate

column.name: VERS2
column.description: Costing Version of Current Standard Cost Estimate

column.name: VERS3
column.description: Costing Version of Previous Standard Cost Estimate

column.name: HRKFT
column.description: Origin Group as Subdivision of Cost Element

column.name: KOSGR
column.description: Costing Overhead Group

column.name: PPRDZ
column.description: Period of Future Standard Cost Estimate

column.name: PPRDL
column.description: Period of Current Standard Cost Estimate

column.name: PPRDV
column.description: Period of Previous Standard Cost Estimate

column.name: PDATZ
column.description: Fiscal Year of Future Standard Cost Estimate

column.name: PDATL
column.description: Fiscal Year of Current Standard Cost Estimate

column.name: PDATV
column.description: Fiscal Year of Previous Standard Cost Estimate

column.name: EKALR
column.description: Material Is Costed with Quantity Structure

column.name: VPLPR
column.description: Previous planned price

column.name: MLMAA
column.description: Material ledger activated at material level

column.name: MLAST
column.description: Material Price Determination: Control

column.name: LPLPR
column.description: Current Planned Price

column.name: VKSAL
column.description: Value of Total Valuated Stock at Sales Price

column.name: HKMAT
column.description: Material-related origin

column.name: SPERW
column.description: Physical Inventory Blocking Indicator

column.name: KZIWL
column.description: Phys. inventory indicator for value-only material

column.name: WLINL
column.description: Date of Last Posted Count

column.name: ABCIW
column.description: Physical inventory indicator for cycle counting

column.name: BWSPA
column.description: Valuation margin

column.name: LPLPX
column.description: Fixed Portion of Current Planned Price

column.name: VPLPX
column.description: Fixed Portion of Previous Planned Price

column.name: FPLPX
column.description: Fixed Portion of Future Planned Price

column.name: LBWST
column.description: Val. Strat. for Current Plan Price, Sales Order/Proj. Stock

column.name: VBWST
column.description: Valuation Strategy for Previous Planned Price, Special Stock

column.name: FBWST
column.description: Valuation Strategy for Future Planned Price, Special Stock

column.name: EKLAS
column.description: Valuation Class for Sales Order Stock

column.name: QKLAS
column.description: Valuation Class for Project Stock

column.name: MTUSE
column.description: Usage of the material

column.name: MTORG
column.description: Origin of the material

column.name: OWNPR
column.description: Produced in-house

column.name: XBEWM
column.description: Valuation based on the batch-specific unit of measure

column.name: BWPEI
column.description: Price unit for valuation prices based on tax/commercial law

column.name: MBRUE
column.description: MBEWH rec. already exists for per. before last of MBEW per.

column.name: OKLAS
column.description: Valuation Class for Special Stock at the Vendor

column.name: OIPPINV
column.description: Prepaid Inventory Flag for Material Valuation Type Segment
